name: Hoshizaki Ice - 10 KG
description:
Hoshizaki Ice – 10KG Pack

Premium cube ice, crystal-clear and slow melting.
Ideal for drinks and professional use.
Packed in a hygienic 10KG bag.

name: Tube Ice - 10 Kg
description:
Tube Ice – 10KG Pack

Tube ice  High-quality made from purified water, featuring a hollow center for faster cooling and efficient chilling.
Ideal for soft drinks, juices, and high-volume beverage service.
Packed in a hygienic 10KG bag for easy storage and use.

name: Crushed Ice - 10 KG
description: Crushed Ice – 10KG Piece  Premium  crushed ice made from purified water, clean and hygienic. Perfect for drinks, food display, and preservation. Comes in a sealed 10KG pack for easy use and storage.

name: Tokyo Ice - 10 KG
description:
Tokyo Ice (Cube Ice) – 10KG Pack

Premium cube ice made from purified water, offering crystal-clear, solid cubes that melt slowly for longer-lasting cooling.
Ideal for beverages, restaurants, events, and food service use.
Packed in a secure 10KG bag to ensure hygiene, freshness, and easy handling.

name: Ice Cup Normal
description:
Ice Cup – Normal (12Pcs Per Pack)

Standard cup with clean ice cubes made from purified water. Keeps drinks cold and refreshing. Ideal for daily use, cafes, and events. Sold per cup, hygienic and ready to use.

name: Ice Ball Normal - 6 Pcs
description:
Ice Ball – Normal (Per Piece)

High-quality Ice Ball made from purified water, perfectly shaped for a premium look and slow melting.
Ideal for cocktails, soft drinks, and upscale presentation.
Sold per piece for convenience and flexible use.

name: Diamond Ice
description:
Diamond Ice – (Per Piece)

Crystal-clear diamond-shaped ice made from purified water. Slow melting to keep drinks cold without watering them down. Ideal for whiskey, cocktails, and luxury presentations. Sold per piece, elegant and hygienic.

name: Dry Ice
description:
Dry Ice (Per Kg)

Very cold solid CO₂ used for strong cooling and fog effects. It doesn’t melt into water, it turns into gas. Ideal for events, transport, and special drink presentation. Must be handled carefully for safety.
